title: 2014 Press Releases
summary: This is an index page listing all Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2014, including FOMC statements, rate decisions, regulatory actions, enforcement actions, and banking applications. The page contains dozens of individual items spanning multiple categories and is not itself a specific research document. Per archive guidelines, listing pages are not archiveable as primary sources.
key_points: The page is an index of 2014 Federal Reserve press releases, not a single document
Notable macro-related items include FOMC statements (10/29/2014, 12/17/2014) and FOMC projections (12/17/2014)
FOMC minutes from October 28-29 meeting were released 11/19/2014
Multiple Term Deposit Facility operations are listed throughout 2014
Regulatory items include Basel Committee credit risk revisions, risk retention rules, and enhanced prudential standards
Enforcement actions and banking application approvals are also included, which are not macro-catalyst content
why_it_matters: This index page serves as a directory to 2014 Fed communications but is not itself an actionable source. Individual FOMC statements and projections from 2014 would be the relevant primary sources for macro catalyst analysis.

issues_found: PAGE_TYPE is listing_page; per rule #6, listing pages are non-archiveable
Source is 12 years old (2014 vs 2026-03-31); marked as historical record
Content is too broad and thin to summarize as a single research note
No specific macro catalyst can be extracted from this index page

human_review.notes: This is a non-archiveable listing page. Should not be indexed as a standalone research note. Individual 2014 FOMC statements and rate decisions should be extracted separately if needed.

notes: Non-archiveable listing page per CORE RULE #6. This page contains an index of 2014 Fed press releases including FOMC statements, rate decisions, regulatory guidance, enforcement actions, and banking applications. The diversity of content types and the index-page format make this unsuitable as a standalone research note. Individual press releases (e.g., specific FOMC statements) should be crawled and archived separately if needed. Published date set to 2014-01-01 as approximation; actual dates span throughout 2014.
